title: Open Compute Project About
note: Source for OCP's mission to apply open-source and open collaboration to data-center hardware, networking equipment, servers, storage, and rack designs.

title: Open19 Standard
note: Source for Open19 as an open data-center hardware standard with standardized interfaces and vendor flexibility.

title: SONiC
note: Source for SONiC as an open-source network operating system relevant to data-center and white-box networking alternatives.

title: OpenDaylight
note: Source for OpenDaylight as an open-source SDN controller platform for programmable networking.

title: ONOS SDN Controller
note: Source for ONOS as an open-source SDN controller for SDN and NFV systems.
